headline: Tuesday commitment: Break the gaining spiral today.
summary: You're gaining 0.27 kg/week when you need to lose 0.69 kg/week—a 0.96 kg gap; today you execute a hard deficit through strict portions and 45 minutes of cardio.
details: Eat only Huel meals plus planned vegan meals today—no emotional snacking, nothing between meals. Use your rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes today (non-negotiable); your sedentary work demands this. Today matters because Tuesday momentum carries through to Friday, and you're 0.4 kg up this week—you need aggressive action now to catch the pace, not weekend motivation that never comes.
